a.xlink:title: GLFW-specific Application implementation.
RAII guard class to initialize/terminate GLFW.
Defines the RenderTarget class, which encapsulates a destination for rendering operations.
GLFW-based Window implementation.
GLFW-specific window configuration structures.
Low-level rendering device abstraction (OpenGL/Vulkan/etc.).
InputManager providing access to various input states.
Defines the Viewport class, which represents a rectangular area for rendering within a RenderTarget.
Camera scene node adapter providing view and projection matrices within a scene graph.
Module exports for vector and matrix type definitions.
Central manager for scoped loggers with configurable sinks.
Simple synchronous logger with configurable output sinks.
Strongly-typed identifier for viewports.
Core type definitions and tag types for the helios engine.
Enum class defining bitmask flags for clearing render buffers before drawing.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Helper storing user pointer data for GLFW windows.
Abstract base class for text rendering in the helios engine.
Abstraction representing a render pass (framebuffer, attachments, etc.).
Container for enqueued render commands and renderables.
Representative of a configurable Renderable rendered by the underlying GL API.
Module exports for logging.
Abstract interface for loading and providing font glyph data.
Strongly-typed identifier for font families.
Mapping of uniform names to values used by shader programs.
Low-level render command for text rendering.
Representation of a low-level render command.
Module exports for mathematical types and utilities.
Key code definitions used across input adapters.
Abstract interface for platform-specific input adapters.
Representation of current gamepad input state.
Identifiers for supported gamepads.
